CustomField.formula: IF ( INCLUDES ( Daily_Report__r.Product_Line__c, "TV" ), "TV; ",null ) & IF ( INCLUDES ( Daily_Report__r.Product_Line__c , "AC" ), "AC; ",null ) & IF ( INCLUDES ( Daily_Report__r.Product_Line__c , "WM" ), "WM; ",null ) & IF ( INCLUDES ( Daily_Report__r.Product_Line__c , "Sound Bar" ), "Sound Bar; ",null ) & IF ( INCLUDES ( Daily_Report__r.Product_Line__c , "Refrigerator" ), "Refrigerator; ",null )
CustomField.label: Product Line
